scope: S4 suite-authoring evidence admission only; generated suites are not modified.

exclusions.rationale: Reference-oracle execution fails because the generated suite expects price-on-request response lines to include numeric-line fields such as promotion_applied/reduction. The reviewed canonical oracle excludes price-on-request lines from numeric assessment output beyond the canonical POA echo fields, so this is generated-suite over-specification rather than bridge failure.

Reference-oracle execution fails because the generated suite expects reduction.percent_total to include fixed-amount reductions as an equivalent percent value. The reviewed canonical oracle treats percent_total as the effective percentage-level summary and reports fixed reductions in reduction.amount, so this is generated-suite over-specification rather than bridge failure.
